description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and caches the node_modules/ and .yarn directories. Define a single deploy stage containing a job named pages that runs only for the pages pipeline. In the pages job execute the exact script commands in order: mkdir .public; ls -la; yarn config set cache-folder .yarn; yarn install; ./node_modules/@angular/cli/bin/ng build --progress false --prod --base-href /ci-wallboard/; ls -la; cp -r ./dist/* .public; cp .public/index.html .public/404.html; mv .public public; ls -la public. Publish the resulting public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
